text:
is the mother of Eren Yeager and the wife of Grisha Yeager.

Appearance

Carla has light-colored eyes and dark hair tied into a loose messy ponytail that she rests on her right shoulder. She often wears a long sleeved dress, an apron over it, and a pair of bedroom slippers.

Personality

Carla is a hard-working mother who cherishes her family.
